title: Museum Spreads 800 Pounds of Peanut Butter in Tribute to Dutch Artist
summary_full: An installation honoring the artist, Wim T. Schippers, features a 270-square-foot hexagon spread on the floor of a museum in Rotterdam.
summary_public: An installation honoring the artist, Wim T. Schippers, features a 270-square-foot hexagon spread on the floor of a museum in Rotterdam.
